creator: cristian.cardoso11@gmail.com
text:
Hello

I tested it on my FreeBSD router which is in the version: 12.1-RELEASE-p10 FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p10 GENERIC  amd64

Curious that I have other FreeBSD servers in the same version that this does not occur.

# mtr 1.1.1.1
Error decoding localhost address (connect failed/Network is unreachable)
mtr: Failure to start mtr-packet: Invalid argument

The above test was done in version 0.94 and in version mtr-nox11-0.94
